action_plan: Sync wearable data before bed so tomorrow's readiness read isn't another blank.
Log any food eaten today retroactively so the 2300 kcal / 215g protein target can be checked against reality.
Weigh in first thing tomorrow to re-anchor the glide path -- a gap this size stalls trend tracking.
If gym was scheduled and skipped, log it as missed (not silent) so adherence % reflects truth.
Keep tomorrow's fluids at 3.5-4.0L baseline since no rigorous session data exists to justify the +1.0L add-on.
